---
title: "Inferred spawning"
author: "Ewout Knoester"
date: "04/08/2025"
output: html_document
---

# Setup
```{r setup}

rm(list=ls()) # Clear workspace
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = '/tmp') #Set directory at current directory for all subsequent chunks
options(scipen = 99) # Have all numbers in non-scientific notation

library(cowplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(grid)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(readxl)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(stringr)

```

# Load data
```{r data load}

# === 1. LOAD AND CLEAN DATA ===

# Load data
spawn.0raw <- as.data.frame(read_excel("Spawning database_2025-08.xlsx"))

# Define two remaining species IDs based on descriptions
spawn.0raw <- spawn.0raw %>%
  mutate(Species = case_when(
    str_detect(Species.description, "(?i)A\\. secale|A\\. squarrosa|A\\. variabilis") ~ "Acropora polystoma",
    str_detect(Species.description, "(?i)A\\. valida|A\\. ocellata") ~ "Acropora natalensis",
    str_detect(Species, "(?i)Acropora sp\\. \\(corymbose yellow smooth\\)") ~ "Acropora polystoma",
    str_detect(Species, "(?i)Acropora sp\\. \\(corymbose normal smooth\\)|Acropora cf\\. natalensis") ~ "Acropora natalensis",
     Species %in% c("Acropora verweyi", "Acropora tenuis", "Acropora polystoma", "Acropora natalensis",
                    "Acropora latistella", "Acropora humilis", "Acropora gemmifera", "Acropora formosa", "") ~ Species,
    TRUE ~ "Acropora spp."
  ))

spawn.1clean <- spawn.0raw %>%
  select(Date, Reef.type, Species, Species.description, Eggs, Comments) %>%
  filter(Eggs %in% c("No", "Immature", "Mature")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Species), !is.na(Eggs), !is.na(Date))

spawn.2sum <- spawn.1clean %>%
  mutate(
    Date = as.Date(Date),
    Month = month(Date),
    Year = year(Date),
    Species = as.character(Species),
    Eggs = factor(Eggs, levels = c("No", "Immature", "Mature")),
    SeasonStartRaw = ifelse(Month >= 7, Year, Year - 1),
    SeasonStart = ifelse(SeasonStartRaw <= 2022, 2023, SeasonStartRaw),
    SeasonLabel = paste0(SeasonStart, "–", SeasonStart + 1),
    DayOfSeason = as.integer(Date - as.Date(paste0(SeasonStartRaw, "-07-01"))) + 1,
    x_numeric = DayOfSeason
  )

# 1. Sort by species and date, then create groups based on gaps > 3 days
merged_dates <- spawn.2sum %>%
  arrange(Species, SeasonLabel, Date) %>%
  group_by(Species, SeasonLabel) %>%
  mutate(DateDiff = as.numeric(Date - lag(Date, default = first(Date)))) %>%
  mutate(DateGroup = cumsum(if_else(DateDiff > 5, 1, 0))) %>%
  group_by(Species, SeasonLabel, DateGroup) %>%
  mutate(MergedDate = as.Date(round(mean(as.numeric(Date)), 0), origin = "1970-01-01")) %>%
  ungroup()

# 2. Replace original Date with merged date, and recompute all dependent fields
spawn.2sum <- merged_dates %>%
  mutate(
    Date = MergedDate,
    Month = month(Date),
    Year = year(Date),
    SeasonStartRaw = ifelse(Month >= 7, Year, Year - 1),
    SeasonStart = ifelse(SeasonStartRaw <= 2022, 2023, SeasonStartRaw),
    SeasonLabel = paste0(SeasonStart, "–", SeasonStart + 1),
    DayOfSeason = as.integer(Date - as.Date(paste0(SeasonStartRaw, "-07-01"))) + 1,
    x_numeric = DayOfSeason
  ) %>%
  select(-DateDiff, -DateGroup, -MergedDate)


# === 2. SUMMARISE BY SEASON-DATE ===

spawn.3pie <- spawn.2sum %>%
  group_by(Species, SeasonLabel, Date, Eggs, x_numeric) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Species, SeasonLabel, Date, x_numeric) %>%
  complete(Eggs = factor(c("No", "Immature", "Mature"),
                         levels = c("No", "Immature", "Mature")),
           fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  mutate(frac = n / sum(n)) %>%
  group_by(Species, SeasonLabel, Date) %>%
  mutate(n_total = sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

# === 3. Y-AXIS POSITIONS ===

y_order <- spawn.3pie %>%
  distinct(Species, SeasonLabel) %>%
  mutate(SortSpecies = if_else(Species == "Acropora spp.", "zzz", Species)) %>%
  arrange(SortSpecies, SeasonLabel) %>%
  mutate(Ypos = rev(row_number())) %>%  # reverse the order
  select(-SortSpecies)

spawn.3pie <- spawn.3pie %>%
  left_join(y_order, by = c("Species", "SeasonLabel"))

# === 4. BASE PLOT ===

dummy_points <- y_order %>% mutate(x = 0)

month_starts <- seq(as.Date("2000-07-01"), as.Date("2001-06-01"), by = "1 month")
month_days <- as.integer(month_starts - as.Date("2000-07-01")) + 1
month_labels <- format(month_starts, "%b")

plot_base <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = dummy_points, aes(x = x, y = Ypos), alpha = 0) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = month_days,
    labels = month_labels,
    limits = c(0, 366),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = y_order$Ypos,
    labels = paste(y_order$Species, y_order$SeasonLabel, sep = " - "),
    expand = expansion(add = 1)
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +  # 1.5x size (default base is 11–12)
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),  # remove x-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),  # remove y-axis title
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# === 5. PIE CHART FUNCTION ===

make_pie_grob <- function(df_group, show_legend = FALSE) {
  ggplot(df_group, aes(x = "", y = frac, fill = Eggs)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1) +
    coord_polar("y") +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("gray70", "orange", "red"),
      name = "Egg status"
    ) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.position = if (show_legend) "right" else "none")
}

radius_scale <- function(n) {
  rescale(n, to = c(3, 7), from = range(spawn.3pie$n_total, na.rm = TRUE))
}

# === 6. DRAW PIE CHARTS ===

group_ids <- spawn.3pie %>%
  group_by(Species, SeasonLabel, Date) %>%
  summarise(n_rows = n(), x_numeric = first(x_numeric), Ypos = first(Ypos),
            n_total = first(n_total), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_rows == 3)

# Collect grobs
pie_grobs <- vector("list", length = nrow(group_ids))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(group_ids))) {
  group_data <- spawn.3pie %>%
    filter(Species == group_ids$Species[i],
           SeasonLabel == group_ids$SeasonLabel[i],
           Date == group_ids$Date[i])

  grob <- ggplotGrob(make_pie_grob(group_data))
  xpos <- group_ids$x_numeric[i]
  ypos <- group_ids$Ypos[i]
  radius <- radius_scale(group_ids$n_total[i])

  pie_grobs[[i]] <- annotation_custom(
    grob,
    xmin = xpos - radius, xmax = xpos + radius,
    ymin = ypos - radius * 0.1, ymax = ypos + radius * 0.1
  )
}

# Collect grobs
pie_layers <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(group_ids))) {
  group_data <- spawn.3pie %>%
    filter(Species == group_ids$Species[i],
           SeasonLabel == group_ids$SeasonLabel[i],
           Date == group_ids$Date[i])

  grob <- ggplotGrob(make_pie_grob(group_data))
  xpos <- group_ids$x_numeric[i]
  ypos <- group_ids$Ypos[i]
  radius <- radius_scale(group_ids$n_total[i])

  pie_layers[[i]] <- annotation_custom(
    grob,
    xmin = xpos - radius, xmax = xpos + radius,
    ymin = ypos - radius * 0.1, ymax = ypos + radius * 0.1
  )
}

# Add all grobs in one go
for (layer in pie_layers) {
  plot_base <- plot_base + layer
}

# === 7. LEGENDS ===

# Create dummy data for legend pies
legend_data <- tibble(
  Eggs = factor(c("No", "Immature", "Mature"),
                levels = c("No", "Immature", "Mature")),
  frac = c(1/3, 1/3, 1/3)
)

# Extract the egg status legend grob
egg_legend_grob <- get_legend(
  ggplot(legend_data, aes(x = "", y = frac, fill = Eggs)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1) +
    coord_polar("y") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("gray70", "orange", "red"), name = "Egg status") +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15, margin = margin(b = 8)),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.key.size = unit(12, "pt"),
      legend.box.margin = margin(0, 10, 0, 0)
    )
)

# Wrap egg legend for patchwork
egg_legend_wrapped <- wrap_elements(egg_legend_grob)

# Prepare sampling effort legend
n_range <- range(spawn.3pie$n_total, na.rm = TRUE)
n_small <- n_range[1]
n_large <- n_range[2]

make_scaled_pie_grob <- function(n_val) {
  df <- tibble(
    Eggs = factor(c("No", "Immature", "Mature"), levels = c("No", "Immature", "Mature")),
    frac = c(1/3, 1/3, 1/3),
    n_total = n_val
  )
  ggplotGrob(make_pie_grob(df))
}

grob_small <- make_scaled_pie_grob(n_small)
grob_large <- make_scaled_pie_grob(n_large)

r_large <- 60
r_small <- 30

# Sampling effort legend figure
size_legend_base <- ggplot() +
  xlim(0, 30) + ylim(0, 31) +
  theme_void() +
  annotate("text", x = 3.8, y = 29.5, label = "Sampling effort", size = 5.2, fontface = "bold") +

  # Large pie
  annotation_custom(grob_large,
                    xmin = 0 - r_large, xmax = 0 + r_large,
                    ymin = 16 - r_large * 0.1, ymax = 16 + r_large * 0.1) +
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = 17, label = paste0("n = 20 colonies"), hjust = 0, size = 5) +

  # Small pie
  annotation_custom(grob_small,
                    xmin = 0 - r_small, xmax = 0 + r_small,
                    ymin = 5 - r_small * 0.1, ymax = 5 + r_small * 0.1) +
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = 6, label = paste0("n = ", n_small, " colonies"), hjust = 0, size = 5)

# Wrap and shift upward
sampling_legend_wrapped <- wrap_elements(size_legend_base) +
  plot_layout() & theme(plot.margin = margin(-30, 0, 0, 0))

# Combine legends in a single row
legend_row <- egg_legend_wrapped + sampling_legend_wrapped +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, widths = c(1, 1))

# === 8. COMBINE AND SAVE ===

combined_plot <- legend_row / plot_base +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1.2, 10))

print(combined_plot)

ggsave("inferredSpawning_Species x Season x Eggs_scaledBySample_legendRight.tiff",
       plot = combined_plot,
       width = 35, height = 21, units = "cm", dpi = 600, compression = "lzw")


```
